creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #2)
> What about creating devel/isl012? Like devel/libopensync022.

That's kinda pointless or no better than having math/cloog install libisl. Anyway, CLooG upstream has a fix according to PkgSrc diffs.

http://repo.or.cz/w/cloog.git/commitdiff/2d8b7c6
